'''Brila Industrial Supplies''' was an industrial supply company owned by [[Tanass Brila]]. It traded in supplies of standard parts for numerous businesses and industrial system. The company was a front for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and secretly concealed shipments of arms and supplies to the Alliance during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="HS" />

{{Company-stub}}
